title: Molecular Biology Master Program Mission and Vision
content:
Molecular Biology Master Program Mission and Vision

MISSION

The mission of the Department of Molecular Biology of Üsküdar University Graduate School of Sciences contributes to the training of qualified academicians in the field of Molecular Biology; To develop interdisciplinary research in molecular biology.

VISSION

The vision of the Department of Molecular Biology is to be a program contributing to the development of science and molecular biology, raising qualified researchers nationally and internationally.
